categories.name: Product
categories.description: Harnesses for product definition, requirements, and planning

categories.name: Harness Engineering
categories.description: Harnesses for building, configuring, and operating AI development

categories.name: Software Engineering
categories.description: Harnesses for coding, architecture, testing, and development workflows

categories.name: Design
categories.description: Harnesses for UI/UX design, visual assets, and design system workflows

harnesses.name: prd-generator
harnesses.description: Context engineering PRD generator for AI-driven software development
harnesses.author: hgflima

harnesses.name: agent-md-writer
harnesses.description: Generate and maintain CLAUDE.md / AGENTS.md files with Karpathy principles, context7-first docs lookup, DESIGN.md consultation, and 3 slash commands (/agent-md:create, /agent-md:update, /agent-md:audit) with parallel detection
harnesses.author: hgflima

harnesses.name: rules-generator
harnesses.description: Analyze a project's stack and generate tailored .claude/rules/ files
harnesses.author: hgflima

harnesses.name: github-readme-writer
harnesses.description: A Claude Code skill that generates comprehensive, professional README.md files for any project
harnesses.author: alfredang

harnesses.name: product-vision-frame
harnesses.description: Define a product's singular purpose and ruthlessly align all decisions to that vision, rejecting good ideas that do not serve the core.
harnesses.author: hgflima

harnesses.name: heal
harnesses.description: Self-healing harness — after a failed Claude Code session, diagnoses root causes, applies approved fixes to skills/rules/CLAUDE.md, and persists structured changelogs to prevent recurrence. Includes /heal:migrate for upgrading from the legacy lessons-learned harness.
harnesses.author: hgflima

harnesses.name: product-brief
harnesses.description: Interactive wizard for creating structured product briefs across project levels (spike, POC, MVP, feature, product, platform)
harnesses.author: hgflima

harnesses.name: ui-design
harnesses.description: Service-agnostic UI/UX specification system — design tokens, screen specs, component definitions, and multi-tool export (adds Stitch MCP direct execution)
harnesses.author: hgflima

harnesses.name: parallel-plan-runner
harnesses.description: Execute an implementation plan via Claude Code's experimental Agent Teams — parallelization analysis, teammate spawn, orchestration, and audit
harnesses.author: hgflima
